onChainActivity.description: Registered Sentinel8004 as agent #1853 on IdentityRegistry
Renamed from AgentGuard to Sentinel8004 (discovered existing AgentGuard agent on Base)
Wrote 1,854 trust attestations (agents #1-1855, excluding self #1853). Empty feedbackURI due to Pinata rate limits.
knownIssues: First attempt used hardcoded 200K gas limit, causing silent reverts on ~90% of agents. Fixed by letting node estimate gas.
All feedbackURI fields are empty (Pinata free tier rate-limited mid-batch). Immutable on-chain.
Pre-fix scores for agents #1849 (81) and #1850 (85) are from buggy L5 indexing. Immutable.

onChainActivity.description: Wrote 3 new attestations with IPFS reports (agents #1856, #1857, #1858). Full pipeline proven end-to-end.

selfFeedbackBlocked.reason: Contract reverts with 'Self-feedback not allowed' when writer address owns the agent

actions: Read ERC-8004 spec (EIP-8004)
Enumerate IdentityRegistry via ownerOf binary search (found 1,855 agents)
Build metadata parser for 5 formats: raw JSON, base64, gzip+base64, IPFS URI, HTTP URI
decisions: Use ReputationRegistry for scoring (ValidationRegistry not deployed on Celo)
Binary search for total count (no totalSupply exposed on the custom ERC-721)

actions: Design 5-layer weighted scoring with circuit breakers
Implement L1 (registration), L2 (liveness), L3 (on-chain via Blockscout), L4 (Sybil), L5 (reputation)
Test against known agents: Arca #2 (fair), babycaisubagent cluster #50-1670 (capped at 15)
decisions: Weight L1-L3 at 0.8x (easier to game), L4-L5 at 1.0x (harder to game)

actions: Write 1,854 attestations to ReputationRegistry
Debug gas issue: hardcoded 200K limit caused silent reverts, switched to node-estimated gas
Register Sentinel8004 as agent #1853
failures: ~90% of first write attempt reverted (hardcoded gas too low for giveFeedback at ~217K)
IPFS pinning via Pinata rate-limited mid-batch, all feedbackURI fields empty
Self-feedback blocked by contract for agent #1853
decisions: Proceed with empty feedbackURI (scores+hashes still on-chain, reports in repo)
Skip self-feedback (contract design, not a bug)

actions: Build MCP server with 3 tools (check_agent_trust, list_flagged_agents, get_agent_report)
Build static dashboard (index, registry, methodology) with dark mode CSS system
Deploy to GitHub Pages
decisions: Static site over server-rendered (simpler, free hosting)
MCP over REST API (designed for AI-to-AI consumption)

actions: Fix reputation.ts: readFeedback used 0-based index, contract uses 1-based
Fix liveness.ts: operator precedence in score calculation
Fix onchain.ts: case sensitivity in address comparison
decisions: On-chain attestations are immutable. Document pre-fix scores for #1849/#1850 as known limitation.

actions: Rename AgentGuard to Sentinel8004 (discovered existing agent on Base)
Update on-chain metadata via setAgentURI
Write 3 new attestations with IPFS reports (proven end-to-end)
Build trust-gate consumer demo (scripts/trust-gate.ts)
Verify MCP server via JSON-RPC stdin pipe (all 3 tools working)
Verify dashboard responsive at 1280x800 and 375x812
decisions: Switch IPFS provider code to support Lighthouse + Pinata fallback
Fix writer to block on IPFS failure (never write without verifiable report)
Fix MCP server to use absolute paths (works from any cwd)
Fix reputation layer to use getLastIndex instead of hardcoded index
